item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 37min Its only been two drafts but Washington GM Adam Peters has not drafted a single player with a pos
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 37min Its only been two drafts but Washington GM Adam Peters has not drafted a single player with a positional RAS percentile under 50% (among those with available RAS). The only current GM with that distinction 1 4 6 4 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 55min . @GennaroFilice mock draft 2.0: Browns land WR Carnell Tate with No. 9 pick after
item.description:

https:// nfl.com/news/gennaro-f ilice-2026-nfl-mock-draft-2-0-cowboys-and-chiefs-shake-up-top-10-with-two-trades?campaign=Twitter_atn … 1 3 6 mil

item.title: JABergman: Around The NFL reposteó Jeremy Bergman @JABergman · 1h Steelers LB Patrick Queen to @GMFB on Aaron Rodgers: "Is he gon
item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó Jeremy Bergman @JABergman · 1h Steelers LB Patrick Queen to @GMFB on Aaron Rodgers: "Is he gonna be back? I don't know. ... But hell, I'll take him. Dude is a great teammate, great quarterback. We all know him, we all love him. He knows how to win. We just have to be better for him."
Adds it's "50-50." 10 18 199 14 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 1h Patriots' Eliot Wolf: 2026 NFL Draft class not historically great but "pretty strong"

item.description:
